title: Good Mom Bad Mom Split from Heal Hurt
display_title: Good Mom Bad Mom Split from Heal Hurt
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Dec 14, 2010 5:49 pm Eric Blair wrote: We still have Gendo, Dr. K, and, depending on who you ask, Yui and Kyoko.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Dec 14, 2010 6:04 pm Bagheera wrote: You mean Kyoko "I went insane because an Eva tried to eat my soul, committed suicide because my husband abandoned me, got raped while trying to protect my daughter, and finally got dismembered right after I managed to reconnect with her" Soryu? That Kyoko? You're right, she's rotten to the core.

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Tue Dec 14, 2010 6:32 pm Bagheera wrote: You mean Kyoko "I went insane because an Eva tried to eat my soul, committed suicide because my husband abandoned me, got raped while trying to protect my daughter, and finally got dismembered right after I managed to reconnect with her" Soryu? That Kyoko?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Dec 14, 2010 6:51 pm esselfortium wrote: That's the one. He did say "depending on who you ask". There's a pretty wide range of interpretations of the morality of her and Yui's actions; I tend to lean towards forgiveness, myself, particularly for Kyoko (as we don't have anything to go on for her motivations like we do Yui's).

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Tue Dec 14, 2010 7:01 pm Bagheera wrote: Yeah, since we know nothing of her motivations I find it awfully hard to find any reason to condemn her. It might be different in the manga; I can't recall offhand.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 14, 2010 7:44 pm The Yui vs. Kyoko stuff EB mentioned recalls a psychotic ANF thread I was responsible for -- where I speculated on those matters in all seriousness, without having seen any AU mangoos -- but I'm only finding it if people REALLLLLLLY want to read it.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Dec 14, 2010 8:00 pm Reichu wrote: The Yui vs. Kyoko stuff EB mentioned recalls a psychotic ANF thread I was responsible for -- where I speculated on those matters in all seriousness, without having seen any AU mangoos -- but I'm only finding it if people REALLLLLLLY want to read it.

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Tue Dec 14, 2010 8:02 pm Bagheera wrote: I agree Yui's motivations are open to interpretation, and that this is reasonable since there's a fair bit to work with in her case. But that's not really true with Kyoko. Not even a little bit.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 14, 2010 8:42 pm Sounds like we need a split. Give me a moment... @Bagheera: Those threads frighten me too, Panther-man, but they're not completely void of value. (I'm actually amazed how much from them still propagates itself without any effort on my part...) Here's the Yui/Kyoko one anyway, just because it was really easy to find, and because I'm evil. @EB: Did I make reference to Yui-hatred and the like in RPG!Kyoko? That would make sense, though... (A vast amount of the crap I came up with during my manic episode has ended up getting channeled into the fanfic domain.) Now I have to resist the temptation to look at those writings again. Also, sigged. (I can't pass up on a good vanity sig!)

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Tue Dec 14, 2010 9:10 pm Seeing as how the stuff was split afterwards, I guess there's no point in not posting this: Reichu wrote: Did I make reference to Yui-hatred and the like in RPG!Kyoko? That would make sense, though...

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Tue Dec 14, 2010 10:19 pm Eric Blair wrote: Well, it helped plant the budding seeds for my own take on Papa Langley, who people in RPG actually found a bastard of such a caliber and magnitude (even more so than Gendo) he was actually killed in one of the scenarios we played.

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Tue Dec 14, 2010 10:32 pm Legendary wrote: And I attempted to have him killed in EVERY scenario we played. Even scenarios that didn't mention him at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Dec 15, 2010 1:15 pm Kyoko is mentioned to be "compensating for giving her work more importance than her daugther" so I's suspect that she was similarily ambitious and obnoxious as her daughther, but had some regrets about it in some corner of her mind... We can't really judge her for what happened after the contact experiment, tough. About Yui, well, the few scenes we saw of her make it quite clear that she loves Shinji and Gendo and did whatever she did to save them from 'permanent' third impact by making sure she#d be at it's very epicenter. She might have overestimated her husband a little...
